title: ENS Resolver
body: Resolve ENS names and reverse-lookup wallet addresses to human-readable identities.

title: Governance Token Snapshot
body: Snapshot all holders of a governance token at a specific block height for voting power calculation, airdrop distribution, or DAO membership verification.

title: NFT Gate
body: Gate content or app features based on NFT ownership verified through GoldRush.

title: Onchain Activity Verifier
body: Verify on-chain activity depth with transaction count, wallet age, chains used, and token diversity — build KYC-lite gates, Sybil filters, and proof-of-personhood checks.

title: Onchain Social Graph
body: Map wallet interaction graphs and identify clusters, influencers, and community structures.

title: Proof of Onchain Activity
body: Verify wallet activity depth and onchain history as a proof of genuine use.

title: Reputation Score Aggregator
body: Aggregate ENS, attestations, NFT badges, and activity into a unified reputation score.

title: Sybil Resistance Scorer
body: Score wallet uniqueness and detect Sybil patterns via onchain behavioural signals.

title: Wallet Identity Graph
body: Map onchain identity signals — ENS, attestations, NFTs — for any wallet address.
